title: WORKERS' COMPENSATION - 211info
text: OREGON STATE WORKERS COMPENSATION DIVISION WORKERS' COMPENSATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Enforces and regulates Oregon's workers' compensation laws and administers funds to benefit employers and workers. Provides information and directs callers to appropriate offices for further information on workers' rights, compensation benefits, reemployment assistance, fraud reporting, dispute resolution, and ombudsman services. 350 Winter Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 947-7585 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 947-7585 General Questions Alternate (503) 947-7810 Central Reception Toll-free (800) 452-0288 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Complete Form 801, Report of Job Injury or Illness and turn it in to your employer Complete Form 827, Workers and Health Care Providers Report for Workers' Compensation Claims if you go to the doctor after your injury Mail report to PO Box 14480, Salem, OR 97309-0405 FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed form 801 or 827 LANGUAGES: English, materials available in Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Labor and Employment Law Workers Compensation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE WORKERS COMPENSATION DIVISION
